name: GitHub Duplicate Usernames
description: Detects active GitHub identities sharing the same username/login.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.login)) AS username, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM github_organization_members u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.login), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.login)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Normalize account identifiers to unique usernames and remove duplicate access identities.
